<!-- title: Sysval (TeaScript) -->
<!-- pageid: 1135 -->
<!-- revid: 10477 -->
<!-- timestamp: 2026-05-21T03:41:29Z -->
<!-- source: https://wohlsoft.ru/pgewiki/Sysval_(TeaScript) -->

[[Category:TeaScript.vbs]]
Sysval is a special function in TeaScript that allows you to read and write system variables.  

=Using the Sysval Class=
To read the value of <code>sysval</code> use:
<syntaxhighlight lang="vb">
sysval(name)
</syntaxhighlight>

To change the value of <code>sysval</code> use:
<syntaxhighlight lang="vb">
sysval(name) = value
</syntaxhighlight>

{{Note|You cannot self-add (+<nowiki>=</nowiki>) nor self-subtract (-<nowiki>=</nowiki>) with system variables in 1.4.5!}}

=Sysval Variables=

====== Events ======

{| class="wikitable"
|+
!Event
!Object
!param1 
!param2 
!param3

|-
|Death
|Block
|The ID of the source object that destroyed the block.
|How the object destroyed the block.
|The ID of the block that was destroyed.
|-
|Hit
|Block
| The ID of the NPC or player who hit the block.
|The ID of the block that was hit.
|If a player hit the block, this value is 1, and if an NPC hits the block, the value is set to -1. The absolute value is how the block was hit.
|-
|No More Objects In Layer
|Block
|The ID of the source object.
|How the object destroyed the block.
|Always returns 0.
|-
|On Screen
|Block
|
The ID of the block.
|Always returns 0.
|Always returns 0.
|-
|Touch
|Liquid
|The first parameter passed during a script call. Only works with liquid types 10, 11, and 17.
|The second parameter passed during a script call. Only works with liquid types 10, 11, and 17.
|Always returns 0
|-
|Death
|NPC

|The ID of the NPC.
|The ID of the player who destroyed the NPC.
|Always returns 0.
|-
|Active
|NPC
|The ID of the NPC.
| Always returns 0.
|Returns 1 if the NPC was spawned from a generator.
|-
|Talk
|NPC
| The ID of the NPC.
|The ID of the player who initiated the talk event.
|Always returns 0. 
|-
|Grab
|NPC
|The ID of the NPC.
|The ID of the player who grabbed the NPC.
| Returns 1 if the NPC was grabbed from above.
|-
|No More Objects In Layer 
|NPC
|The ID of the NPC.
|Always returns 0.
|Always returns 0.
|-
|Next Frame
|NPC
|The ID of the NPC.
|Always returns 0.
|Always returns 0.
|-
|Touch
|NPC
|The ID of the NPC.
|The ID of the player who touched the NPC.
|The value returned depends on which side of the NPC was touched.
0 = wasn't touched

1 = touched from above

2 = touched from below

3 = touched from the left side

4 = touched from the right side

5 = touched from center
|-
|Enter
|Warp
|The ID of the player who triggered the event.
|The ID of the warp that was used.
|Always returns 0.
|}



======Object Count======
{{Tea_table|1=  
{{Tea_row|double|ncount|Read Only|The number of NPCs in the level}}
{{Tea_row|double|bcount|Read Only|The number of blocks in the level}}
{{Tea_row|double|bgocount|Read Only|The number of BGOs in the level}}
{{Tea_row|double|wcount|Read Only|The number of warps in the level}}
{{Tea_row|double|lcount|Read Only|The number of liquids in the level}}
{{Tea_row|double|ecount|Read Only|The number of effects in the level}}
{{Tea_row|double|actncount|Read Only|The number of active NPCs in the screen}}
{{Tea_row|double|actbcount|Read Only|The number of active blocks in the screen}}
}}

======Game Data======
{{Tea_table|1=  
{{Tea_row|double|gamemode|Read Only|Returns if the game is currently singleplayer or multiplayer (0: singleplayer, 1: multiplayer, 2: battle mode)}}
{{Tea_row|double|playerhealth|-|The current number of 1-Ups collected}}
{{Tea_row|double|lvltimer|Read Only|The current game timer.}}
{{Tea_row|double|score|-|The current scores}}
{{Tea_row|double|coincount|-|The current number of coins}}
{{Tea_row|double|starcoincount|Read Only|The current number of star coins collected}}
{{Tea_row|double|starcount|Read Only|The current number of stars collected}}
{{Tea_row|double|wldinvcount|Read Only|The current number of items in the world map inventory}}
}}

======Camera======
{{Tea_table|1=  
{{Tea_row|double|scrsplitstyle|Read Only|Current splitscreen configuration. (player1/player2; 0: off, 1: top/bottom, 2:bottom/top, 3: left/right, 4: right/left.)}}
{{Tea_row|double|player1scrx|Read Only|Player 1 camera top left x position.}}
{{Tea_row|double|player1scry|Read Only|Player 1 camera top left y position.}}
{{Tea_row|double|player2scrx|Read Only|Player 2 camera top left x position.}}
{{Tea_row|double|player2scry|Read Only|Player 2 camera top left y position.}}
}}

======Player Abilities======
{{Tea table|1=
{{Tea_row|double|playerbasestatus|-|The starting status of the player given after losing a life.}}

{{Tea_row|double|enablewalljump|-|Enables the wall jump ability.}}
{{Tea_row|double|spinjumpfloating|-|Enables the spin jump floating ability.}}
{{Tea_row|double|yoshiflyable|-|Enables Yoshi's flutter jump.}}

{{Tea_row|double|disablejump|-|Disables the player's ability to jump if set to 1.}}
{{Tea_row|double|disablespinjump|-|Disables the player's ability to spin jump if set to 1.}}
{{Tea_row|double|disableduck|-|Disables the player's ability to crouch/duck if set to 1. (Penguin Suit sliding hitboxes are buggy, and Link's downward stab will also disabled.)}}
{{Tea_row|double|disableclimbing|-|Disables the ability to climb on climbable backgrounds.}}

{{Tea_row|double|disablegrabtop|-|Disables the ability to grab NPCs from above regardless of NPC text code settings.}}
{{Tea_row|double|disablegrabside|-|Disables the ability to grab NPCs from the side regardless of NPC text code settings.}}

{{Tea_row|double|disablehammershield|-|Disables the player's Hammer Suit shield when ducking if set to 1.}}
{{Tea_row|double|disablepenguindash|-|Disables the ability to slide on belly when the player has a penguin suit.}}
{{Tea_row|double|disableshelldash|-|Disables the player's ability to use the shell suit dash if set to 1.}}

{{Tea_row|double|disablelinksword|-|Disables Link's sword attack if set to 1. (Animations will still play)}}
{{Tea_row|double|disablelinkshield|-|Disables Link's shield if set to 1.}}

{{Tea_row|double|bplayer1health|-|The current number of 1-ups for player 1 in battle mode.}}
{{Tea_row|double|bplayer2health|-|The current number of 1-ups for player 2 in battle mode.}}

{{Tea_row|double|invtimewhenhurt|-|How many frames the player's temporary invincibility lasts when taking damage/powering up. Default value is 150.}}
{{Tea_row|double|fluddrestorespeed|-|Determines how much your F.L.U.D.D. tank fills up by every second the player is in water. Default value is 200, which maxes out the tank capacity.}}
{{Tea_row|double|disablesharedfludd|-|If set to -1, each F.L.U.D.D. nozzle type will have separate water capacities. }}
{{Tea_row|double|enableinertiafornpc|-|Enables momentum when jumping off standable NPCs.}}
}}



======Game Mechanics======
{{Tea_table|1=  
{{Tea_row|double|enablelighting|-|Enables the lighting system if set to 1. Doing so automatically changes it to -1, interestingly. Value must be set to -1 for it to be read.}}
{{Tea_row|double|enablesmb3statussys|-|Enables the SMB3/Modern power-up system.}}
{{Tea_row|double|coinsforextralife|-|The limit of coins the player can store. Minimum value is 1.}}
{{Tea_row|double|shellcanhitblockside|-|Enables shells to hit invisible blocks.}}
{{Tea_row|double|npcstyle|-|Disables suit power-up NPCs from changing into pendants when playing as Link. This also disables coins from turning into rupees when playing as Link. Does not work in multiplayer mode.}}
{{Tea_row|double|showhud|-|Hides the HUD if set to 1. }}
{{Tea_row|double|enablepause|-|Disables the player's ability to pause if set to 1.}}
{{Tea_row|double|disablesave|-|Disables the player's ability to save if set to 1.}}

}}


======Time======
{{warning|Computer's timer values do not work in replays}}
{{Tea_table|1=  
{{Tea_row|double|gametime|Read Only|The total amount of frames the level has been running.}}
{{Tea_row|double|systime|Read Only|Seems related to System Time although the format displayed is unknown.}}
{{Tea_row|double|year|Read Only|The year counter of the user's computer calendar}}
{{Tea_row|double|month|Read Only|The months counter of the user's computer calendar}}
{{Tea_row|double|day|Read Only|The days counter of the user's computer calendar}}
{{Tea_row|double|hour|Read Only|The hours counter of the user's computer timer in the 24-hour time format}}
{{Tea_row|double|minute|Read Only|The minutes counter of the user's computer timer}}
{{Tea_row|double|second|Read Only|The seconds counter of the user's computer timer}}
}}

======System======
{{Tea table|1=
{{Tea_row|string|gametitle|Write Only|Sets the window's game title.}}
{{Tea_row|double|syslang|Read Only|The value of the computer's current language configuration. [https://www.science.co.il/language/Locale-codes.php Values can be found here.]}}
}}

======Other======
{{Tea table|1=
{{Tea_row|double|param1|-|A parameter passed by the event that called the script. [PUT LINK TO MORE INFO HERE]}}
{{Tea_row|double|param2|-|Check <code>param1</code> for info.}}
{{Tea_row|double|param3|-|Check <code>param1</code> for info.}}
{{Tea_row|double|levelscript|-|Can store the maximum number of scripts the level has.}}
{{Tea_row|double|worldscript|-|Can store the maximum number of scripts the world map has.}}
}}

======Unknown======
{{Tea table|1=
{{Tea_row|unknown|disablesysconstreset|-|Unknown}}
{{Tea_row|unknown|machinecode|Read Only|Unknown}}
}}

======Unusable======
{{Tea table|1=
{{Tea_row|unknown|grabshellinsmb3way|-|Unusable in 1.4.5. In past version, it was to check to allowed the player to grab a shell while falling into it.}}
}}
